metadata.title: Ways to Bank | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan Islamic Banking is the complete way to bank whenever and wherever you may be. Simply enjoy the finest Ways for a Convenient and Safe Banking Experience from the comfort of your own home or office.

content: your payment type and company Enter the required Consumer Number into the field provided and all the bill details will be shown automatically! You can also register the bill for all future payments so that you do not have to re-enter your Consumer Number every time Make your Payment by a simple click of a Mouse! Paying through ATMs Visit any Meezan Bank ATM, insert your Meezan Card and enter your PIN. menu and select the Payment type and company. the bill details (amount, due date etc) Consumer Number every time. Make your Payment with a simple click! Bills made Easy QuickPay allows you to pay your Utility, ISP and Mobile Phone Bills free of cost anytime, without waiting in queues at the bank’s counter! Meezan QuickPay service is available 24 hours a day 7 days a week via Meezan Bank’s Internet Banking, Mobile Banking App and ATM Network. of a Mouse! Call Centre Our Bank is available 24/7 for you With our Call Centre facility, you no longer have to take time out to visit your branch for your everyday banking needs. By simply dialing 111-331-331 or 111-331-332 (dial +92-21-111-331-331 or +92-21-111-331-332 from outside Pakistan) you get access to a wide range of personalized banking services including answers to questions on Islamic Banking. You can also access our self-service banking, where you can access your account details & product information by our Interactive Voice Response System (IVR). General Services Consumer, ADC & Liability Products Information. ATM / Debit card activation. * ATM PIN generation & re-issuance. * / Debit card blocking. ATM /Debit card replacement Account balance confirmation. * Account transaction details. * Web-Pay (on-line shopping) activation / de-activation. * Value-Added Services Transfer of Funds b/w your own account. * Request for Cheque book. Request for Pay Orders. Cheque Stop Payment request. Bank Statement Request. SMS registration /change & block request * Request for email update /change. * Internet Banking Reactivation of Internet Banking. * Recovery of Password. * Recovery of User Name. * Deactivation of Internet Banking services. IBFT Activation * IVR Change PIN / TPIN. Inquire Balance. Transaction Inquiry. Product Information. * Customer Needs To Call From His System Updated Numbers ATMs Enjoy a host of banking services round-the-clock! Meezan Bank offers a nation-wide network of ATMs located at its branches and prominent offsite locations. There is no need to carry cash anymore; simply go to the ATM and withdraw cash anywhere, anytime. We also offer access to more than 8,000 ATMs country-wide via 1Link and MNET Networks. Transfer funds your Meezan Bank account to any Meezan Bank account free of charge. Inter-Bank Funds Transfer (IBFT) is available at all Meezan ATMs. account to any other 1-Link Member Bank's account. Pay your Bills through to Meezan QuickPay free of charge for all major Utility Companies, Internet Service Providers, Phone and Mobile TelCos. Redeem funds from your Al-Meezan Investments account(s). Every Branch is My Branch Avail Our Banking Services from Any Meezan Bank Branch Discover the future of banking through the “Every Branch is My Branch” initiative, and embrace a new era of convenient banking. Access Beyond Limits Your banking options are no longer restricted by your location. You can any Meezan Bank branch to access wide range of our banking services, just as you would at your parent branch. Seamless Security We ensure secure, swift, and hassle-free transactions to provide you with a seamless and reliable banking experience. Unmatched Convenience Obtain various banking solutions and services without visiting your parent branch: Customer Profile Update Cheque Book Issuance Pay Order Issuance Funds Transfer Real-Time Gross Settlement (RTGS) Cash Deposit / Withdrawal (PKR/FCY) Stop / Release Cheque Payments Outward Cheque Clearing Update Expired CNIC Mark Zakat Exemption Convert Asaan Account into Normal Account Activate Dormant Account Tax Certificate Issuance Duplicate Account Statement Issuance Term Deposit Issuance / Prematurity Kafalah Issuance Meezan Branch Banking also offers the following home remittance services Cash over Counter Direct Credit to Meezan Account Inter-bank Funds Transfer Real Time Gross Settlement (RTGS) Instant Credit Facility to Mobile Wallets MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum!
